tools.name: ctx_linear_issues
tools.description: List my assigned Linear issues using the GraphQL API.
tools.command: curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: {{.api_key}}' -d '{"query": "{ viewer { assignedIssues(first: 25, orderBy: updatedAt) { nodes { identifier title state { name } priority priorityLabel updatedAt } } } }"}' https://api.linear.app/graphql | jq '.data.viewer.assignedIssues.nodes[] | {id: .identifier, title: .title, state: .state.name, priority: .priorityLabel}'

tools.name: ctx_linear_cycles
tools.description: List active cycles across Linear teams using the GraphQL API.
tools.command: curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: {{.api_key}}' -d '{"query": "{ cycles(filter: { isActive: { eq: true } }) { nodes { name startsAt endsAt progress team { name } issueCountHistory completedIssueCountHistory } } }"}' https://api.linear.app/graphql | jq '.data.cycles.nodes[] | {name: .name, team: .team.name, starts: .startsAt, ends: .endsAt, progress: .progress}'
